name: @as3-wasm-runtime/bouncing-ball
description: Vite demo for the experimental AS3-inspired Wasm runtime.

scripts.asbuild: pnpm prepare-assets && asc assembly/index.ts --config asconfig.json --target release
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @as3-wasm-runtime/runtime-js build && pnpm asbuild && tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build
